products.title: BMB - Sport-Tek - Grid Iron Tech Fleece Hoodie
products.body_html:
• Printed BMB Logo
  • 7.1-ounce, 100% polyester
  • Three-panel hood
  • Two-tone, textured drawcords
  • Closed-hole Graphite mesh hood lining
  • Taped neck
  • Raglan sleeves
  • Rib knit cuffs and hem
  • Integrated front pouch pocket
